entry.title: Some routing values not refecting in quantity structure
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I noticed after running ck40n, some of the values in my routing reflected in the cost estimate with quantity structure, and some also did not.

For example, a work center with two activity types (machine setup and labor) will only see the values of labor reflecting cost estimate with quantity structure.

I am new to CO. Your assistance on this is greatly appreciated

entry.title: Re: Content Enricher with Combine and Enrich Aggregation Algorithms in SAP CPI
entry.content: what is content enricher

entry.title: How can I use variable value in inner join in SQLScript
entry.content:
Hello,

Please direct me to use the value in the mat_table in the inner join in a different SQL.

The mat_table has the value /1MD/MD______038. I want to use the table name in the second query. Currently, I've hard coded. I like to replace with dynamic value.

Thank you,

William

mat_table =

  1.       select physical_name

        from

        (

            select   physical_name,

            ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY physical_name

                       ORDER BY version desc) RANK_COLUMN

            from mdg_gn_tgobj

            where logical_name = 'TCK_MM_MATERIAL' order by version desc

        ) where rank_column = 1;

2nd query as under

tusmd1213 =

        select

            usmd120c.usmd_crequest as usmd_crequest,

            usmd_seqnr,

            "/1MD/MMMATERIAL" as matnr,

            right(usmd_value,13) as usmd_value,

            right(usmd_value,1) as right_val,

            CASE

                when right(usmd_value,1) = '-'

                        then CONCAT(CONCAT( 'MM   USMDKMMMATERIAL               ',usmd120c.usmd_crequest),right(usmd_value,13))

                ELSE         CONCAT(CONCAT( 'MM   USMDKMMMATERIAL               ',usmd120c.usmd_crequest),right(usmd_value,12))

            END as objectid

 

        FROM usmd120c

 

--     Select material Only

        inner join usmd1213

        on    usmd1213.usmd_crequest = usmd120c.usmd_crequest

        and   usmd1213.usmd_entity      = 'MATERIAL'

        and   usmd1213.usmd_entity_obj  = 'MATERIAL'

 

--      Link WITH usmd110c to determine MM only

        inner join Usmd110C

        ON    usmd120c.usmd_creq_type = Usmd110C.usmd_creq_type

        AND   usmd110c.usmd_model   = 'MM'

        and   usmd110c.mandt        = :p_clnt

 

--      Get the material from the table

       inner join "/1MD/MD______038" as _md038   ( Need to change with dynamic value instead of hardcoded )

   

        on _md038.USMDKMMMATERIAL = right(usmd_value,13)

      where     usmd120c.usmd_crequest in (   '000000084178')

;

entry.title: SAP CI iFlow exception as noted in SAP Note 3293244 but still processed Post Processing
entry.content: We have a production iFlow used for SFTP -> SFTP integration that experienced the "'Cannot store file' and 'cause: 4:" condition as outlined in SAP Note 3293244. We do understand what the cause of the exception was caused by and have resolved the condition. However, we discovered that the SFTP Sender adapter of the flow still triggered it's Post Processing action even though the SFTP Receiver adapter had failed with this exception. In our case it was a Delete File post processing step and we ended up loosing the file as we do not store those payloads. I'm interested to know if this is standard behavior where exceptions can occur in the iFlow and yet still allow the Post Processing to resolve? In our case it was a 'Stale File Handle' error.

UI Sample code:

 

The CAP service is :

and CAP schema.cds is: 

Any suggestions or help much appreciated.

Thanks,

Varad

kyoungmo Kang

entry.title: The data is not getting updated in the DB, on executing CAP Odata V4 service from SAP UI5 App
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm facing a problem while creating records in my HANA cloud trial instance. The data is not getting updated in the HC DB, however on executing service (it is a CAP Odata V4) from SAP UI5 app, the response is '201 Created'.

SAPUI5 code;

service.cds :

And schema.cds is as follows:

Any thoughts what is the reason and suggestions for possible resolution?

Thanks,

Varad

entry.title: Where can I get the event specification for a custom RAP BO event defined in S/4HANA on-premise?
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have developed a custom event based on RAP BO to trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation. In order to create a custom event project, we need to upload an event specification from the Build Lobby.

Now, my question is where I can get the event specification for a custom event in S/4HANA on-premise? For S/4HANA Public Cloud, I've seen the "Maintain Event Channel Binding" Fiori app was used to get the metadata, but I cannot find the same option in the channel configuration customizing.

Any input is greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: Charm Transport Timeout
entry.content:
We get a time out for big charm changes (more than one transport included)
I can see that the transport is running on the target system. 
Workaround: We need to re-trigger the action for the next status

Is it possible to change the timeout?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Charm Transport Timeout
entry.content:
Hi,

Regarding your concern, you could follow SAP note: 0001426029 to adjust the parameter, in case even after adjustment, the time still is not long enough to finish the import action, then you may need to consider split your current TRs into small batches for import, and don't contain big objects in the TR as well. 

In case the TR import indeed needs more time for importing, then from ChaRM perspective, we cannot wait for that long, you can refresh the change document to move the next status once the import finished finally.

Thanks,

Shawn

entry.title: Re: Data Services encountered an error while reading real...
entry.content: DS supports RT job, but there are limitation of it. A XML message must be used as source. You can check document Real-time jobs(https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATA_SERVICES/8df1dcdec88b4df2afc3eb1cc954b3dc/57802f6e6d6d1014b3fc9283b0e91070.html) for example. This will give you a better understanding of DS RT job.

entry.title: When Will SAP Joule Studio Be Available? Beta Access Inquiry !
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community 🍀,

I recently came across announcements about SAP Joule Studio being integrated into SAP Build, with an expected release in Q4 2024. However, as of now, I haven’t seen any official updates or availability.

Additionally, I saw the demonstration video here on SAP Developer Youtube Channel, and it showcased the impressive capabilities of Joule Studio within SAP Build.

Could anyone provide information about:

  1. The exact release date for SAP Joule Studio?
  2. Whether beta access is available, and if so, how to apply for it?
  3. Any updates or documentation regarding where and how Joule Studio will be accessible once released?

I’m keen to explore Joule Studio’s capabilities and see how it integrates with SAP Build. Any guidance or links to additional resources would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help. ☺️☺️

Best regards,
Doin nam

entry.title: Re: How to run Forecasting in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Eduarda,

Thank you for your reply!
I am very sorry for the lack of information related to your question...

Since we are validating in a Test and Demo environment, we have almost all Scope Items enabled.
We use the application Change Material.
However, we are not using the production planning and control and only want to use forecasting as an order point for sourcing and procurement.

For the Material for which we want to run forecasting, we have registered the MRP1 view as follows:

MRP2 view:

Forecasting view:


In this state, the "Execute forecast" button in the Forecasting view is executed.

The results of the execution are shown in the screenshot below. Reorder point is not proposed.

How can I get reorder point suggested?

entry.title: Re: Guidance on Generating SSL Certificate and CSR for SA...
entry.content:
Hello @onanongj 

 

SAP does not provide a tool for generating CSRs or certificates. You will need to purchase a certificate from a Certificate Authority (CA), such as DigiCert, which typically provides tools and guidance for generating them.

If the customer's environment is on a hyperscaler, you can also issue certificates directly through the hyperscaler.

For more details, please refer to my blog, where I cover these topics.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/best-practices-for-technical-implementation-of-sap-business-one-web-client/ba-p/13801658

 

Regards
EunSeok

entry.title: How to change the default currency for aging analysis?
entry.content:
The aging analysis apps have the default currency set to EUR. The requirement is to set the default currency to USD. Is there any way to change the default currency?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change the default currency for aging analysis?
entry.content: Please kindly refer to the KBA 3100724 - How to change the default currency in "Overdue Payables" app.

entry.title: Re: Result recording for qualitative characteristics in QE11 using BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS
entry.content: Is there a final solution to this problem? If so, could you please let me know? Thank you.

entry.title: Mass changes to PO line item: supplier commit date
entry.content:
It is necessary to batch modify the delivery dates in the orders based on the supplier commit date provided by the vendor. Is there currently a way in the system to make bulk modifications, and after making changes, will I be able to see the time of each modification and check them, ensuring that the previous dates are not overwritten?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Mass changes to PO line item: supplier commit date
entry.content:
App 'Mass Changes to Purchase Orders' can change the fields of multiple purchase orders simultaneously. You can change the purchase order header and purchase order item for multiple purchase orders. 

  • Open app Mass Changes to Purchase Orders
  • Select the Purchase Order Items tab
  • Select all purchase orders items for mass processing 
  • Press Mass Edit
  • Select Replace Field Value and change, press Apply Mass Changes
  • Press Apply 
  • Press View Job and the app Monitor Mass Changes opens 

The log for this mass change of PO will shows in this app 'Monitor Mass Changes - Purchase Orders'. With this app, you can view the simulation and mass change jobs of various statuses for purchase orders. You can view or monitor changed values of multiple fields in the mass change logs. You can also view these jobs from the Mass Changes to Purchase Orders app by clicking Monitor Mass Changes.

entry.title: Re: Role Based Permissions & proxy function for Delegate PM forms 2H/2024 release
entry.content:
Hi Karthik, We are also having the same issue. Ideally, the permissions should be set up as below:

Delegation Management Permission (delegators)

e.g. Admin -> Managers

Delegator-Delegatee Relationship -> (delegatees)
e.g. Managers - Managers

Delegator-Employee Relationship (Subject User of the form to be delegated)
e.g. HR Admin - all
e.g. Managers - Direct Reports

For the first two permission roles wherein the target population is Managers, the question is how can we group all of them together as usually they cannot be grouped using a people pool filter as they are random managers assigned to employees. Did you group your managers manually?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Development in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, you can do side-by-side development using ABAP. You can create custom applications side-by-side on SAP Business Technology Platform and deploy into S/4HANA Cloud Public edition.

If you mean you are using TDD, you can learn and verify development methods with the S/4HANA Cloud Public edition.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: DO document flow status remains In process , even after the billing document is created
How to Include Specific Updates in Purchase Order Notifications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content: I created a situation type on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system that sends notifications to customers when a purchase order is updated. However, my boss suggested that it would be great if customers could know which specific section or part of the purchase order has been updated in the notification. I’m not sure how to implement this, and I would appreciate any guidance.

entry.title: Additional window opening in windows 11 for Fiori dashboard
entry.content:
When launching SAP Solman dashboard additional edge window opens before the dashboard window opens.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Additional window opening in windows 11 for Fiori das...
entry.content:
Dear *,

This is a normal behavior, not an issue/error.
An additional window opens before the actual window opens when you set using Edge (based on Chromium) on SAP GUI.

Anyway, you can set it to use other browsers, for example: Internet Explorer or others.
For further info please check KBA ##2558574 - How to use other types of explorer e.g. Edge, Chrome or Firefox for SAP Solution Manager

Best regards,
Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: Inventory budget
entry.content: Our system is S4 HANA, we use WBS to control inventory budget, inventory budget amount exceed by using WBS, how could it reminds? Seems for inventory budget, If the budget is exceeded, there will be no reminder.

entry.title: Adjust Pick Up Address associated with the TM Location in Freight Unit
entry.content:
Hi, we intend to use the Best Practice scenario 6W2 to manage ocean freight process with the ability to create road freight orders from the freight booking. The issue we have is that the plant we have in the sales order and STO is not the actual pick-up location as we are getting the item picked up directly from the supplier to the port. I found that there is no way I can insert a stage before the stage that has the plant location. I can only insert intermediate stages between the source and destination location. One option I can think of is to alter the address of the source location (that comes from the plant) when the freight unit is generated. The other way is to create the freight order manually but I am not sure whether I can tie the freight order to the same freight order, and I really like the idea of generating pick and delivery freight order from within the freight booking.

Does anyone have any other ideas apart from the above option I can think of?

P/s: If the triggering order is a sales order, I have thought of doing a a third-party order but we dropped the idea since we have a process of receipting the actual stock into the plant and issuing the stock out. Also, we would like to have a consistent approach to handle this for both sales order and STO if we can help it.

Appreciate any ideas on the above.

Thanks

SFC

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: @CarlosAccorsi I noticed that Richa above posted a screenshot of 401CL, 401HC and 401KL.  I don't have those Constants created and when I tried to implement Notes 3470747 and 3470796 it said it Cannot be implemented to both Notes.  I checked and we do meet the minimum requirements, we are on Release 608D7.  What am I missing to implement the SECURE 2.0 Act - Section 109? Please help.

entry.title: A New Era for SAP BusinessObjects: Embracing Change in a Cloud-Driven World
entry.content:
In recent years, the conversation around digital transformation has been dominated by one word—cloud. Businesses across industries are flocking to cloud solutions, drawn by promises of scalability, agility, and cost-efficiency. But in the midst of this cloud-first narrative, SAP, a global leader in enterprise software, continues to invest in its on-premise solutions, especially SAP BusinessObjects (BO). This decision raises questions: Why is SAP still prioritizing on-premise solutions? What is the long-term strategy for SAP Business Intelligence (BI)? And how will this impact SAP’s large, diverse customer base?

Let’s deep-dive into these key questions and understand the roadmap ahead for SAP BusinessObjects.

1. The Cloud Dominates the Conversation, But Is It the Only Path?

In today’s IT landscape, cloud computing is a major topic of discussion. Cloud analytics, in particular, has experienced rapid growth as organizations see the advantages of lower infrastructure costs, quick deployment, and flexible resource scaling. Solutions like SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) offer seamless integration with other cloud-native applications, providing powerful tools for real-time analysis, machine learning, and predictive insights.

Despite the strong interest in cloud solutions, not every enterprise is eager to move away from their on-premise systems. This highlights SAP's thoughtful and strategic choice to continue investing in its on-premise SAP BusinessObjects platform.

2. Why Is SAP Still Investing in On-Premise Solutions?

This balanced approach allows enterprises to modernize at their own pace while giving on-premise customers more time to plan their BI roadmap for transitioning to the cloud.

3. SAP’s Enterprise Strategy: Enabling Live Enterprise Reporting

SAP is dedicated to Enterprise Reporting, which is an important part of its overall strategy for SAP BusinessObjects. The aim is to offer "Live Enterprise Reporting" capabilities that provide real-time business insights to help organizations make better decisions. Many companies still depend on SAP BusinessObjects for their daily operations and reporting, using its powerful reporting engine for everything from financial and operational reports to strategic KPIs.

As businesses change, SAP's vision is to enable live data connectivity between on-premise and cloud systems, allowing for smooth reporting no matter where the data is located.

4. SAP BusinessObjects vs. SAP Analytics Cloud: A Case Study Snapshot

The SAP customer base is diverse, with different levels of cloud adoption. Here’s a simple comparison based on case studies from various industries:

SAP BusinessObjects Customers: SAP still has many customers who rely on SAP BusinessObjects for their everyday enterprise reporting. These organizations often have complex, legacy data environments and specific compliance requirements, primarily in industries like manufacturing, healthcare, and financial services, where long-term data storage and auditing are essential.

SAP Analytics Cloud Customers: The SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) has gained popularity in industries that are more cloud-friendly and agile, such as retail, technology, and consumer services. SAC customers enjoy real-time insights, AI-driven analytics, and a user-friendly interface that empowers non-technical users.

Both platforms serve different needs, and SAP’s hybrid strategy recognizes that the future of business intelligence will likely involve a mix of both solutions rather than a one-size-fits-all approach.

Way Forward -

SAP officially confirmed they would continue to invest in SAP BusinessObjects with a future release named SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025.

BI 2025 is the next SAP BusinessObjects release after BI 4.3 which will be available by the end of 2024. Customers will have the choice of staying on-premise or moving to the cloud, whether that be on SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) or the Private Cloud Edition (PCE).

This future release will only focus on the most-adopted tools which will include:

Web Intelligence

Single source .unx universes

Crystal Reports Classic

SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office

BI platform (includes the BI Launchpad)

SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 will thus provide on-premise customers more time to plan their BI roadmap to the cloud.

What will not be included in BI 2025?

However, while this is great news for SAP BusinessObjects customers, SAP will stop investing in certain components for this future release:

entry.title: Re: Freely Defined Currency or Additional Currency + Functional Currency in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear @Shakeel_Ahmed ,

I created new freely define currency Z0 and assigned the sources currency type to 10 (Company Code Currency).

Few transactions created in DEV and QAS but NOT IN PRD yet.

Recently user needed to change the sources currency type to 00 (transaction currency).

My question:

Can i change the sources currency type to 00 without deleting the transaction DEV and QAS?

your feedback is much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Blank page when logging in SAC inside Excel Desktop
entry.content:
Cross check once have you Added the below urls in the SAC system or not

If not please add in the below location
Open SAC System --> Administration  App Integration  Trusted Origins

  • https://hcs.cloud.sap
  • https://*.live.com
  • https://*.online.office.de
  • https://*.sharepoint.com
  • Once these steps are done recheck.  
  • And also check which domain you are using.

The standard domain for the add-in support is hcs.cloud.sap (Doesn't need additional configuration).Tenants of the other domains, for example, sapanalytics.cloud or hanacloudservices.cloud.sap, must be manually configured by the Microsoft365 administrator.

entry.title: Re: Getting 403 forbidden error on accessing an OData Ser...
entry.content: su53 is empty

entry.title: Re: Why should we consider Rule based consolidation of Investments vs Activity based in Group Report
entry.content: Hi Scot, As mentioned in the intro, this is the first of a series of blog posts. Stay tuned and there is further content on the way.

entry.title: Could ‘Mid-Code’ Development Work with SAP Build be the Next Career Move?
entry.content:
An Intellyx BrainBlog by Jason English for SAP Build

Let’s say you have some development skills. You can code a business application that calls APIs and talks to the SAP backend systems. You need pro-code tools to get your job done.

Or, let’s say you are not oe of those developers, but you have business skills. You know what customers need, and you understand the business process that gets kicked off with each web transaction. You need low-code tools to get the job done with automation, while abstracting away both paperwork and technical complexity.

If you are in one of the abovementioned groups, then stay with me here. If you want to stay ahead of the market and build better applications, faster, maybe you should look to mid-code tools to advance your career.

Pro-Code, Low-Code, or the middle road?

Zen masters often talked about a middle way. Or, maybe it was a samurai thing.

Either way, we’re talking about charting a middle road through the software development process, somewhere between coding apps, connecting APIs and writing queries from scratch, versus using apps to connect business process flows with data.

My colleague Jason Bloomberg penned an useful paper for SAP practitioners titled “The Future of Software Development” (free download here) which highlights how pro-code and low-code tools are starting to incorporate facets of each other:

“Many pro-code tools incorporate low-code capabilities, such as drag-and-drop API interactions, ‘boxes and lines’ for workflow design and data modeling, and wizard-based data integration.

At the same time, low-code tools have added more sophisticated features. Low-code vendors have always understood that hand-coding plays a significant role in any organization’s use of their tools.

Despite this convergence, pro-code and low-code tools serve different goals.”

While the goals of these toolsets may be divergent, what if both pro-code and low-code developers could collaborate in a ‘mid-code’ fusion environment where the two spaces converge?

The business perks of a fusion development shop

Line-of-business employees who work outside of development are often described as ‘citizen developers’—individuals who understand business context and could contribute useful application functionality to the business—if only they had the right low-code tools.

The SAP Build suite already offered visual drag-and-drop capabilities for low-code users to stitch together pre-built workflows and data from SAP backends and other integrated services.

With their latest release, citizen developers can ‘uplevel’ their business expertise in a mid-code way, with a genAI model trained on specific business verticals, and horizontal functions such as finance, HR, or supply chain, to allow natural conversational queries for guidance.

For instance, take a regional market development owner for an automotive brand. This business-user could ask and answer questions to design a mobile app for dealers to order new cars and replacement parts that talks to SAP inventory systems, and Ariba for purchase orders without writing a line of Java code.

But let’s say that app is about 95% complete—and still needs a capability to credit an employee identified in the HR system with a sale. At this point, a technical developer can jump into a shared project, with a few lines of ABAP or a change to an API definition, they can save the new adapter for use in similar processes.

Each new feature developers code and introduce modularly improves the relevance and utility of the low-code app design and process automation environment, for an innovation flywheel effect

Staying ahead of commodity work with genAI

There’s a lot of talk about genAI coding assistants and agents replacing developers to save money, but upon scratching the surface of any serious enterprise, that hype bubble pops quickly.

Enterprises never have a deep enough team of skilled business developers to deal with the modernization backlog they already have, so if anything, they are looking for genAI to help the developers they retain improve productivity.

“Including genAI in the developer’s toolbox will definitely save time, but perhaps not as much as people hope,” says Bloomberg in the whitepaper. “It will shift developers’ activities away from easily automatable, routine tasks to more sophisticated activities that organizations will want to leave in the hands of human professionals.”

Developers want to spend most of their productive work hours ‘in the zone’ of developing innovative solutions, so the most practical place for genAI to assist them first is as a co-pilot within their IDE, providing lookahead suggestions and potential error conditions while they are actively coding.

Determining the best approach to each unique problem is still up to the developer, but everything non-essential to the problem at hand could be optimized with genAI backed by a library of solutions and pre-tested components, from setting up infrastructure and permissions according to company policy, to coding responsive UIs for different devices.

AI has one superpower compared to human developers: it never gets bored, so it doesn’t mind tedious work. Developers can call on genAI to shortcut tedious tasks such as rebuilding existing integrations and writing documentation, while remaining fully in control of their own contributions.

The Intellyx Take

The future is going to demand a lot more out of us all. If we want to stay relevant, we don’t need to become superhuman technologists, we simply need to find better ways to work together and understand each other’s intent.

GenAI can augment human productivity with its understanding of the languages of both humans and systems, but it will never replace human ingenuity. The latest SAP Build which offers both pro-code and low-code teams a new ‘mid-code’ application delivery modality with AI in a supporting role.

When both sides of the technical divide can get involved in building solutions in a fusion development environment, hand-in-hand with automation and genAI, perhaps we’ll see that divide closed for good.

©2024 Intellyx B.V. Intellyx is an independent analyst firm, and is editorially responsible for this document. At the time of writing, SAP is an Intellyx customer. None of the other organizations mentioned here are Intellyx customers. No AI bots were used to write this content. Image sources: Adobe Image Express (JE modified).

entry.title: Re: Inventory budget
entry.content:
Added Finance tag. Please remove other tags.

Suggest you to read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Can we restrict some Web Services ID for External Catalog in Manage Purchase Requisition - Pro app?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We would like to seek an advice if it is possible to restrict some Web Services ID for External Catalog in Manage Purchase Requisition - Professional app.

We currently implemented the OCI initially for Maintenance Orders with some enhancement in a BADI wherein we needed to have the Web Services ID to be named with Plant value (e.g. PH01_SUPPLIER) get the value of plant as we needed a 2nd importing parameter that can also be query parameter for internal tables being called up alongside with the VENDORMAT in order to get the SAP Material Number from master data. The problem is we will be maintaining a lot of Web Services ID so for Purchase Requisition that is not related to Maintenance Order and want to purchase from the external catalog, there will be a quite number of repetitive suppliers. In the maintenance order, we have this configuration Assign Catalogs to Order Type that is why we were able to have specific external catalog to be chosen from the list.  Unlike to app Manage Purchase Requisition - Professional app, it will list all the catalogs.

Hope you can share solution.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Live data connection to SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
hi @Vijayyy @Yousuf_Hasan The SuccessFactors system used in the sign in step does it have People analytics Stories enabled? This is required for the cloning.

thanks

Maheshwar

entry.title: Re: Companion content not visible in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Check what's going on in the web browser's developer console. At first glance, it seems like the authentication issue (with SAP Enable Now) or the SAP Companion configuration was changed. 

 Anyway, errors in the developer console will 100% tell you what's going wrong.

entry.title: Re: Labelling length of dimensions in the bar chart
entry.content: Seems you are still using classic story stack, please try with optimized story experience where you should find the same option as table.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Development in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: s4 public cloud system also support developer extensibility, just like how you do badi implementation(to enhance the standard function) in on-premise system.

entry.title: Re: Inventory budget
entry.content: Hello, As I know the budget control is for value only. It's not possible to restrict quantity posting. If your requirement is to control by quantity, I'm afraid you need to raise feature request. Best Regards, Owen

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Live data connection to SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @MichelLaaroussi 

The SuccessFactors live connection will leverage the Role based Permission assigned to you by SuccessFactors

thanks

Maheshwar

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Live data connection to SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @CoronAF 

I will consider this enhancement for a future release.

Provide an option to rename a connection as Test and Production

Thanks

Maheshwar

entry.title: Re: How to install more than one DP Agent on a machine (W...
entry.content: Hi Ashish, you can use any different port number which is not used by other application, say 6060, 6061

entry.title: Re: Inventory budget
entry.content: Thanks for OwenWhat we need is to control the budget amount of inventory not the quantity,

entry.title: Re: Synchronous Goods Receipt with Quality Management Integration
entry.content:
Hi ,

Yes, Above setup and configuration was done in S4 HANA 2022 Embedded version only and work perfectly fine. Please check QM related setting at S4 side also.

entry.title: Re: Inventory budget
entry.content: Thanks for Owen' reply, what we need is to control the budget amount of inventory not the quantity, but SAP standard function can not control the budget amount of inventory. Right?

entry.title: Re: Inventory budget
entry.content: If it's about value, and budget control is not working, suggest you to check the reasons in KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3505874

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Advanced Scheduler Configuration
entry.content:
Can you please provide timer where it runs at 8:00 CET every 14 days starting from some particular date. I did this settings in Advanced but the problem is If I set every 14days starting from suppose 15th.

Then it runs on 15th and 29th of the month, Next schedule should be 13th of next month (for 30days month). But it does not run on next month. I think it understands like every15th and 29th of the month.

I do not find any solution for this ? Can you please help.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI/ Integration Suite Splitter returning as repo...
entry.content: To get the solution, add a gather step after the splitter. Between the splitter and gather steps, use a content modifier to write a customized response. You’ll receive this response in the next step message. This is how I overcame my challenges.

entry.title: Re: Inventory budget
entry.content:
As I explained in the other question, there is no function to control inventory for budget. And it's not clear about the business requirement. Why do you want to control the inventory amount?

You can also check the relevant existing question:

Solved: Limiting total inventory value for a material - SAP Community

"You actually have to do those checks in the order creation. At MIGO it is much too late."

entry.title: Re: How to transform yourself from a fresher to an expert SAP Consultant?
entry.content: Maybe a translation based on AI can be integrated into this app, so people can write in many languages and reader clicks on "translate to english". Like with YouTube comments. Only saying, maybe add it to the backlog of this product.^^

entry.title: Re: QS61 how it works
entry.content: There is a solution to copy the test results

entry.title: Copy the verification results
entry.content: Hello! Please tell us in full the process of copying the results from one inspection batch to another. Everything from the very beginning, preferably with screenshots. I will be very grateful

entry.title: Re: 🇳🇱 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (Zoetermeer, NL)
entry.content:
@AxelMinnemann is correct @mahi_angam20 … just RSVPing is enough. We keep track of the order that people have sign up in case the maximum capacity is reached. A few weeks before the event we send confirmation emails/reminders.

Looking forward to meeting you both at the event.

entry.title: Re: Exploring the RSS feeds of the new SAP Community platform
entry.content: @mamartins hmmm can you share which specific feed have you imported in Outlook? It is just to check on my end and test it myself.

entry.title: Re: Need help Updating PDF content through CPI
entry.content:
Hi, You need to create Payload in multiform data and send the same to Endpoint URL.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/lets-send-multipart-form-data-to-external-receiver-cpi-to-ai-app/ba-p/13694334

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sending-form-data-from-sap-integration-suite-best-practices-and-techniques/ba-p/13779024

above blogs may help

with regards

Siva

entry.title: Position Copy Permission - Recruiter
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customers has this following ask. We have a Recruiter field in while creating position. The requirement here is that for each position, only the recruiter whose name is specified in the "Recruiter Name" field will have permission to edit that specific position.

For example, if the "Recruiter Name" for Position Code 1000 is mentioned as Rashmi, only Rashmi will have the permission to edit that position. PFA the screenshot.

Is it feasible to achieve, or would any workaround be really helpful?

Let me know if you have any questions or need further clarification.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Handling mandatory fields in a multi-country environment in SuccessFactors Recruiting
entry.content: Excellent.. Thanks for sharing your knowledge

entry.title: Re: Scheduling agreement flexible workflow on approval ,T...
entry.content: For the part to restart the WF only if there is 10% increase in amount, were you able to find any BADI or enhancement, for scheduling agreement WF i am not able to find any BADI to add this condition.

entry.title: Feasibility of Workflow in Document Generation in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I hope you're doing well.

One of my customers has this following ask. Is it feasible to set up a workflow during the document generation process in SuccessFactors. Specifically, if a workflow can be triggered or configured while generating documents in employee profile. PFA the screenshot.

Is it feasible to achieve, or would any workaround be really helpful.

Thank you.

entry.title: Creation of Production Order using Recipe process
entry.content: Hii Team, I am at waste management Industries facing issue to Weighting Average for BOM or recipe preparation, We have multiple RM for 1 FG , but before starting production Process, we have to select manual BOM through weighting avg formula of the MIC's which are recorded at the time of GR for incoming material. Currently, there is customized T-Code for the process. But we want to process it in SAP Best Practice or in SAP standard way. Please suggest process which includes same. Your suggestion will be highly appreciated. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Can the client mantain the data of "Output invoice bo...
entry.content:
您好，

您提到的配置點 102326 "指派號碼範圍至營業處" 目前暫無對應的終端用戶應用 App，其涉及銷售開票、財務憑證等跨模組核心流程憑證，故其操作權限需要謹慎處理。基於當前系統設計，您可以考慮參照 Process Navigator -> SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition -> Implementation -> Configurator apps，該 Excel 表單 “IMG Activity TRAN in BC” 中可在 F 列按 SSCUI ID（與 CBC 配置步驟 ID 一致）搜尋您的目標配置點，找到 A 列即為控制特定配置點的權限業務目錄，僅將需要開放給終端業務用戶的配置點的權限業務目錄分派給對應的業務用戶角色，從而實現業務用戶可訪問 CBC/SSCUI、但僅可調整/查看特定配置點的需求。

期望調整配置點為 Client independent（各系統環境單獨配置，不傳輸），請將需求詳細反饋至 SAP Customer Influence Portal。您在本問題中提及的需求目前已有類似反饋，請參閱 https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/315906/?section=sectionDetails。

順頌時祺，
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Parametrization Variables in SAC
entry.content:
Hi 

Steps to Join Forecast and Price in an Optimized Story:

1. Create a Price Model: Import a table with `Course_Type` and `Price` as a separate model.

2. Add Both Models: Add the Forecast model and Price model to your optimized story.

3. Link Models: Use Model Linking to link `Course_Type` in both models.

4. Create a Calculation: Add a calculated measure for total price using this formula:

Total Price = Enrollment * Linked(Price)

5. Display Data: Add a table to show the forecast and total price side-by-side.

 

or try this way

Approach: Use Linked Models to Create a Dynamic Join in the Story
1. Prepare the Price Table Model:

Upload the price data as a separate model:
Course_Type Price (€)
Bachelor’s 300
Master’s 1,000
Postgraduate 800

Ensure Course_Type in this model matches the dimension in the forecast model.

2. Link the Models in the Story:

Open the optimized story.
Add both the Forecast Table and the Price Table models to the story.
Click on the Model Linking option in the story toolbar.
Create a linked dimension between the Course_Type field in both models.

3. Create a Calculation in the Story:

Add a new table or chart to the story, pulling data from the Forecast model.
Add a calculated measure for total price using the formula:

Total Price = Enrollment * Linked([Price Table].[Price])

Use the formula editor to reference the linked dimension and price measure from the Price Table model.

entry.title: Re: aFacetValueIds is Null error in SAC transport
entry.content:
Hi Pranav,

we are facing the same error since the QRC4/2024 Update. "aFacetValueIds is null". We can not import folders and files (story's, ...). 

We also opened a case within the SAP Support but there is no answer or solution until day! 

Best Regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: DO document flow status remains In process , even after the billing document is created
entry.content: Sorry you have to provide more information: which document oder, delivery... you are talking.

entry.title: Re: How to create a software component in S/4HANA on-premise?
entry.content:
Thank for the question and the answer 🙂

Is there any reason not to use the predefined software components delivered in the system (e.g. ZLOCAL shown here which is configured for cloud-ready development)? Alternatively, what is the advantage of creating your own?

EDIT: Ok, never mind, I guess the fact that those are flagged as local is the problem! 😄

entry.title: Unable to pass a parameter dynamically into a fiori URL via mashup in C4C
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We were trying to create a fiori URL mashup and were trying to pass a parameter dynamically with reference to the standard mashup SM00039 

But there is no provision to this via the mashup authoring in  UI configuration in C4C.

In the SDK as well we couldn't find any option to achieve this.

Could you please help us with your insights

What's happening in SM00039 ?

1. It's the 'Customer 360' standard mashup which is available on the Account workcenter.

2. When you click on action "Customer 360 View" .. it invokes the above mashup in a new tab

3. When invoking it passes the "External ID" field from Account object into the fiori app

What are we trying to achieve ?

1. Create a similar mashup with fiori app URl

2. And pass a parameter into the fiori app, the app loads after the search is filtered on the passed parameter

PFA screenshots for your reference.


Thanks and Regards
Krishna

entry.title: SAP Java NetWeaver list application java process details
entry.content:
Hi, 
I have installed SAP Java NetWeaver and when i run ps aux | grep java , it shows only the jstart process. There are many java applications running in the AS Java , how do i get the process details of those applications ?

entry.title: Re: SAP EMS objects
entry.content:
Hi Sam，

It is advisable for entitlements created in the EMS system to have corresponding objects or records in the upstream SAP S/4HANA system to ensure seamless management and fulfillment of those entitlements. This approach aligns with the best practices for SAP S/4HANA and helps in maintaining data consistency and operational efficiency across the enterprise. Esbetially would be helpful if you have upsell / downsell / change inside upstream, the auto generation integration content could listen to event of these document and affect entitlement EMS system accordingly.     

Br, Lambert Chen

entry.title: Re: Companion content not visible in SuccessFactors
entry.content: Hello Anton, thank you for your reply! I checked the console and indeed found some error messages about Enable Now (see attachment). I think it has something to do with the config on SF? Or is this something we can fix on the side of Enable Now? Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Request for Free Certification Support
entry.content:
Dear David,
 
My name is Yazan Omar Albarbarawi. I am writing to express my interest in the SAP Digital Skills Initiative. I am impressed by SAP's dedication to providing opportunities for underrepresented individuals in the technology field.
 
I am currently looking to switch careers mid-life and am particularly interested in gaining expertise in SAP FICO. However, my financial situation makes it difficult for me to afford the certification exam.
 
I would like to request the opportunity to take the SAP FICO certification exam free of charge as part of the Digital Skills Initiative. I am fully committed to the learning process and excited about the prospect of becoming SAP-certified.
 
Thank you for considering my request. I look forward to your response.
 
Sincerely,

entry.title: Delivery items DSO in BW doesn't contain movement type 602?
entry.content: We are using the standard SAP extractor 12lis__12_vcitm for extracting delivery items from SAP ECC system to BW system. There are no filters in the PSA layer or any visible ones in the extractor, however there are no items that have the BWART (movement type) 602 - Delivery cancellation (601 reversal). How can we change this?

entry.title: Migration Object EWM Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,Regarding data migration, we usually (on-premise and private) use:/scwm/isu: ewm stock/scwm/sbup: storage binAssign fixed bin (is there a massive?)Which are the related ones in Public cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Migration Object EWM Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Please refer below SAP help portal page:

https://help.sap.com/docs/DATAMIG_S4HANA/d5aa3caabab04bb68d9cc3352d003330/b8d3c4714d324d3182532a3f6ce63abb.html?locale=en-US

At current release CE2408, there are 3 migration objects for EWM - Warehouse Stock, Warehouse Storage Bin and Warehouse Storage bin Sorting.

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Inventory budget
entry.content: Yeah, it would be much greate if can control budget checks in the order creation. Seems still can not fulfill?

entry.title: Re: Companion content not visible in SuccessFactors
entry.content: According to the console, SAP Enable Now is blocking CORS request from your SF system. In SAP Enable Now Manager got to Administration - Server Settings, Security and Passwords. Find the "Enable CORS" setting and switch it ON. In the CORS-allowed sites field put *

entry.title: Re: Duplication in component tab of maintenance order whi...
entry.content: Problem is resolved by implementing the Note 3543478. This note is shared with us by SAP after creating OSS. So once this note is available on support portal, you can use it to resolve the issue.

entry.title: Re: Generate data auto for iDOC testing
entry.content: Google search engine is a good tool. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/wp-plu-not-triggering-from-wpma/qaq-p/653114

entry.title: Operate Your SAP Solution with the Power of SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Introduction

In today's fast-evolving digital landscape, organizations increasingly rely on robust tools to ensure seamless IT operations and achieve business continuity. SAP Cloud ALM (Application Lifecycle Management) has emerged as a transformative solution for managing operations across SAP and non-SAP systems. This blog explores how SAP Cloud ALM for Operations supports consultants, project managers, and leaders by providing end-to-end observability, automation, and actionable insights tailored to modern IT landscapes.

1. SAP Cloud ALM Overview

SAP Cloud ALM bridges the gap between IT operations and business processes. Designed to support hybrid environments, it delivers operational transparency, enabling organizations to monitor system health, automate tasks, and resolve issues efficiently.

Key highlights:

  • Supports both SAP and non-SAP systems.
  • Integrates monitoring, alerting, and analytics.
  • Ensures a unified approach for IT and business users.

2. Why Choose SAP Cloud ALM?

With around 3,000 active customers and significant monthly metrics like 25 billion health checks and 30 million alerts, SAP Cloud ALM demonstrates its scalability and reliability. Key benefits include:

  • Comprehensive coverage for cloud and on-premise systems.
  • Centralized monitoring for outages and maintenance.
  • Proactive alerting and event correlation.

3. Business Process Monitoring

Business Process Monitoring ensures operational transparency by tracking key business process KPIs. This empowers teams to detect disruptions, resolve anomalies, and maintain continuity.

Key features:

  • Predefined KPIs for swift implementation.
  • Alerts for process disruptions with drill-down capabilities.
  • Automated problem resolution.

4. Integration & Exception Monitoring

Integration & Exception Monitoring guarantees reliable data exchange across systems. It correlates messages across interfaces and provides insights into exceptions.

Key highlights:

  • Supports SAP and non-SAP integrations.
  • Unified monitoring for peer-to-peer and orchestrated interfaces.
  • Embedded alerting and issue analysis.

5. Real User Monitoring

Real User Monitoring evaluates system performance from an end-user perspective. This tool uncovers performance bottlenecks and errors by tracking both front-end and server-side activities.

Benefits:

  • Transparency into real-time user experiences.
  • Correlation of user requests with system responses.
  • Root cause identification for performance issues.

6. Synthetic User Monitoring

This feature simulates user interactions to proactively detect performance and availability issues. It offers continuous 24/7 monitoring using automated scripts.

Advantages:

  • Early detection of issues before impacting users.
  • Standardized metrics for performance trends.
  • Compatibility with various web applications.

7. Job & Automation Monitoring

Job & Automation Monitoring simplifies job execution and task management, ensuring operational efficiency.

Capabilities:

  • Tracking job status, delays, and execution times.
  • Historical data analytics for trend identification.
  • Embedded alerting for timely notifications.

8. Configuration & Security Analysis

This feature validates system configurations to ensure compliance with organizational standards.

Key aspects:

  • Automated change analysis for cloud and on-prem systems.
  • Pattern-based search capabilities.
  • Planned enhancements for TO-BE vs. AS-IS comparisons.

9. Health Monitoring

Health Monitoring assesses the technical health of systems and applications through KPIs, metrics, and alerts.

Highlights:

  • Light-weight monitoring for ABAP systems and SAP SaaS services.
  • Embedded analytics to detect trends.
  • Integration with corrective action tools.

10. Intelligent Event Processing and Notification Management

Event processing and notification management streamline alert routing and task assignments.

Key functionalities:

  • Unified event handling for manual and automated triggers.
  • Centralized alert inbox for monitoring use cases.
  • Integration with external task systems like Jira and ServiceNow.

11. External API Management and Operations Automation

SAP Cloud ALM integrates external APIs and automation engines to enable advanced operational workflows.

Use cases:

  • Automating responses to system events.
  • Exposing mass data to analytics platforms like Grafana.
  • Integration with SAP Automation Pilot and SAP Build Process Automation.

12. Analytics & Intelligence

Embedded analytics allow teams to analyze performance trends, identify critical events, and predict anomalies using AI-driven tools.

Key advancements:

  • Change point detection in real-user monitoring.
  • Dynamic thresholds in synthetic monitoring.
  • Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud.

13. Business Service Management

Business Service Management (BSM) aligns IT metrics with business objectives, ensuring seamless service delivery.

Key features:

  • Unified handling of SAP and customer-initiated events.
  • Service-level Availability (SLA) tracking.
  • Embedded reporting for business visibility.

Conclusion

SAP Cloud ALM for Operations is revolutionizing IT and business process management for SAP customers worldwide. With its comprehensive monitoring, intelligent automation, and actionable insights, it empowers organizations to optimize operations and achieve digital transformation. Whether you are a Solution Manager Consultant, Basis expert, or SAP leader, SAP Cloud ALM offers a clear pathway to operational excellence.

Let’s continue to explore the future possibilities of SAP Cloud ALM!

Keep Learning and Keep Sharing !

entry.title: How to use company currency for supplement budget process
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

The client uses THB base currency, I use manage budget document-project for supplement budgeting.

Question:

1. How can I change the currency for the Controlling Area base to "THB"?

My project currency is THB.

Thanks,

May

the forecast is not calculated once the product is introduced but it is calculated after 2 weeks

 

what could be the possible reasons for it

entry.title: Re: ODATA loading only column headers no data
entry.content:
Hi,

Funny, i had the same behavior yesterday. In my case i had the Webi report configured with "Refresh on Open" - disabling this option then made the data to appear in Excel again. I run 4.3 SP04 P08.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano and fellow SAP learners.

My name is Hammad Ali, and I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude to @David_Chaviano and the SAP team for their incredible efforts in launching the Digital Skills Initiative. This initiative has been immensely beneficial, providing access to high-quality resources and empowering learners like me to upskill effectively.

I am thrilled to have completed the "SAP Learning Journey Developing with SAP Integration Suite" program under the Digital Skills Initiative, and I am eager to leverage the opportunity to take a free certification attempt. This program is a shining testament to SAP's unwavering commitment to nurturing learning, growth, and innovation within the tech community.



Please accept my warmest kudos to @David_Chaviano and the entire SAP team for driving such impactful initiatives and making a lasting difference in the lives of learners worldwide. Your dedication, expertise, and passion for education are truly inspiring, and I feel grateful to be a part of this journey.

Best Regards,
Hammad Ali.

#SAP #DigitalSkillsInitiative

entry.title: Re: Contact and product data references in the Emarsys sc...
entry.content:
If it is still relevant,

For contacts, it is simply {{ contact.fieldnumber }}.
Ex. {{contact.1}} is the first name.
{{contact.37|required}} will be the mobile number and will send the message only if the value isn't empty.

You can know the field number from Management>Field Editor 

For products, it depends on the source. If it is from a Webextend cart event or Personalization Rules catalogue. It changes the opening {% foreach %} statement.
It is a good idea to take example from the Abandoned Cart block in the master template. 

Hope it helps

entry.title: Re: Field DELI_SERV_TYPE & DELI_SERV_NUMBER of Entity AD_...
entry.content: Hi Aditya, thanks for your response. I am aware that field properties can be changed in several places and I can debug to find out the reason why the field is grayed out. The reason for my post was if anyone knows why the fields are grayed out. I will find out the reason and update here, which might be useful for someone else in the future.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Output Management: How can an output from DEV/TEST be marked as test print?
entry.content:
Is it possible in the SAP S/4HANA public cloud to define the output of documents generated from development system or test system are marked as test prints? 

We are thinking of a watermark or similar.

We want to prevent printouts from the test or DEV system from being mistakenly circulated.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Output Management: How can an output from DEV/TEST be marked as test print?
entry.content:
Is it possible in the SAP S/4HANA public cloud to define the output of documents generated from development system or test system are marked as test prints? 

We are thinking of a watermark or similar.

We want to prevent printouts from the test or DEV system from being mistakenly circulated.

entry.title: Re: SAP EMS objects
entry.content:
Hi Lambert,

This indeed an apt suggestion. Wondering , if automating the same is an out of the box SAP feature. Seamlessly, generating the entitlements in EMS for S4 offerrings is standard. But, how can we achieve creating a S4  warranty service contract from warranty entitlement in EMS? Is there any standard way or need to a totally custom development?

 

Thanks and regards

Sam

entry.title: Try sending data in multipart/form-data format on SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
*This is a technical verification article that is not yet known if it can be put into actual use.

There is a rare problem in using SAP Build Apps. That is that SAP Build Apps does not support multipart/form-data format communication. Although this format has been requested less and less recently, it is still in use, so I thought it might be possible to use it and tried to implement it.

Current SAP Build Apps

Recently, the existing REST API Direct Integration has been replaced by universal REST API integration. I personally think that the HTTP Method is fixed for each action such as Select/Create, but compared to REST API Direct Integration, where it was easy to give arguments, there are some things that make me think, “Hmmm...” However, since the HTTP Method can be specified within an action such as Select/Create, it is no longer the case that “Select is used to insert data,” which is a good thing. However, since the HTTP Method can be specified within Select/Create and other actions, it is no longer the case that “Select is used to insert data”, which is a good thing.

HTTP Header and BODY can be manipulated to some extent manually. It would have been nice to be able to choose to send data in multipart/form-data format here, but unfortunately it is not an option.

Brief description of the format multipart/form-data

You should read the RFC specification for this, but here is a “super” simple explanation

  • Specify “multipart/form-data; boundary=<boundary string>” as Content-Type in Header.
  • In the BODY, specify the following

--<boundary string>
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="<Field name>"

<Field value>
--<boundary string>
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="<Field name>"

<Field value>
--<boundary string>--

  • The boundary string must be preceded by “--” and followed by “--” at the end.
  • The same string as the BOUNDARY string must not appear in this entire sentence.
  • Use CR+LF for line feed code.
  • A single line break should be inserted between the Content-Disposition and the value of the field.

are available. (Of course there are others! Be sure to check the RFC specifications!)

The key point is "The same string as the boundary string must not appear in this entire sentence". When data is submitted from a browser using an HTML form, this process is done automatically and a boundary string that does not appear in the data is automatically created, but this time you must do it yourself. In particular, this multipart/form-data format can be used to upload file data. You will need to be careful in this case.

How to submit data in multipart/form-data format in SAP Build Apps?

The following is an example. It is based on the motif of submitting the following HTML form. The destination is https://httpbin.org/post, which is a useful service for this kind of situation.

 

<form action="https://httpbin.org/post" method="post">
<input type="text" name="Field1">
<input type="text" name="Field2">
</form>

 

1. Integration settings

Use the Universal REST API Integraion.

Set the two text items that are boundary and form input items as Additional Input.

Use Create as the method, making sure POST is set as the Request Method.

Create "Content-Type" as Request Headers.

Value should be set as follows so that the Boundary set for Additional Input is used.

 

"multipart/form-data; boundary=" + query.additionalInputs.boundary

 

This is the key : Request body mapper setting.

 

"--"+query.additionalInputs.boundary + "
" + "Content-Disposition: form-data; name="Field1"

"+query.additionalInputs.TextField1+ "
--" + query.additionalInputs.boundary + "
" + "Content-Disposition: form-data; name="Field2"

"+query.additionalInputs.TextField2+ "
--" + query.additionalInputs.boundary +"--"

 

You can get a general idea of what this actually looks like from the Exsample results in the screenshot. The point is that the line breaks are done with CR+LF (= ).
If you understand this formula, you will be able to handle any form.

Enter appropriate values in the test and run it.

As mentioned above, boundary is a delimiter in the data set in the body, so it must not duplicate the data entered in the form. (I use a random keyboard clattering.)

It seems that https://httpbin.org/post recognized this as form data.

2. Logic building

When actually incorporating this into the logic, let's say the screen is constructed as follows

Set the following as the logic for the button.
Assign GUID to Boundary for now.

*As mentioned above, it is necessary to check if there is any problem using GUIDs. I think you need to check if this generated GUID value is not included in the value entered in the form, and if it is found to be included, you need to generate the GUID value again and check again .... If it is found to contain a GUID value, the logic should be to generate the GUID value again and check it again.

"Create Record" assigns boundary and form values as parameters.

OK, Let's try.

Set a value on the form and run it.

The value was recognized as a form value = Send this data as "multipart/form-data".

 

Not a very cool way to do it, but for now I was able to send data in multipart/form-data format with SAP Build Apps. I hope this will be of some help.

entry.title: Re: Field DELI_SERV_TYPE & DELI_SERV_NUMBER of Entity AD_...
entry.content:
Hi All , 

I have just observed that Field DELI_SERV_TYPE & DELI_SERV_NUMBER is becoming editable as soon as we add ERP Customer data . So it solves my issue.

entry.title: Re: Profit center substitution at sales order level in S4HANA public cloud
entry.content: hello, please, substitution of profit center doesn' t work for Intercompany stock transfer, on delivery level. Mnetioned substitutions are done on sales order level only. What would be the best way how to modify determination of profit center in this proces, 1p9 scope item ? custom logic ? thanks for help

entry.title: Re: How to check ATP results for multiple items on one sc...
entry.content: Display Product Availability app is in the meanwhile available since 2408.1 CFD release in the Public Cloud. With 2502 release it will be also possible to display product availability for two special stock use cases: sales documents and customer consignments.
